rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass, improving sentence-level flow, fixing tense drift, breaking up run-on sentences, and removing filler without altering technical claims or scope.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence or uncertainty for any of the claims made in the text.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stayed within the agreed-upon scope, covering exactly the same topics as the original text.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not provide any annotations for non-cosmetic changes made to the text.
